# relayd_metrics (Data Source)

Reads relayd runtime metrics as an integer map.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "relayd_metrics" "current" {}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `metrics` (Map of Number) Current relayd runtime metrics keyed by metric name.
